result.stdout:
newtool:
  creates a new dotnet tool

Usage:
  dotnet newtool [options]

Options:
  -ff, --from-file <filePath>       Creates a dotnet tool, from an already
                                    serialized tool, which was saved as *.json
  -st, --save-to <directoryPath>    Saves the current dotnet tool
                                    configuration as json file to given path.
  -uv, --use-visualstudio           Opens visual studio after generating the
                                    new dotnet tool.
  -uc, --use-code                   Opens visual studio code after generating
                                    with the new dotnet tool.
  -ur, --use-rider                  Opens the JetBrains Rider IDE after
                                    generating with the new dotnet tool.
  -az, --as-zip <zipFile>           Generate a dotnet tool and zip is as zip
                                    file.
  -fm, --use-fastmode               Do not run MsBuild and no test run of your
                                    tool

commands.payload:
newtool:
  creates a new dotnet tool

Usage:
  dotnet newtool [options]

Options:
  -ff, --from-file <filePath>       Creates a dotnet tool, from an already
                                    serialized tool, which was saved as *.json
  -st, --save-to <directoryPath>    Saves the current dotnet tool
                                    configuration as json file to given path.
  -uv, --use-visualstudio           Opens visual studio after generating the
                                    new dotnet tool.
  -uc, --use-code                   Opens visual studio code after generating
                                    with the new dotnet tool.
  -ur, --use-rider                  Opens the JetBrains Rider IDE after
                                    generating with the new dotnet tool.
  -az, --as-zip <zipFile>           Generate a dotnet tool and zip is as zip
                                    file.
  -fm, --use-fastmode               Do not run MsBuild and no test run of your
                                    tool
